cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So there are a bunch of people here: Willian, Michaela, Conception, Inga, and Sal. Inga says Conception tells the truth. Sal says Inga lies. Does Sal tell the truth?" Wait, maybe the first statement "Willian tells the truth" is also a statement made by someone?
